name: 7'x10' Textural Stripe Rectangular Woven Outdoor Area Rug Light Green - Threshold™
description: Bring subtle style and dimension to your balcony, deck or patio space with this Textural Stripe Woven Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular rug features a multicolor woven striped pattern and tassel accents on the edges for a pop of texture that will perfectly tie together your outdoor decor. The woven outdoor rug also has a latex backing to help it stay in place. Plus, it's easy to clean — simply spray off dirt and debris with a garden hose to keep it looking great all season long.
